name: Classical Thermodynamics
description: Phenomenological thermodynamics for macroscopic heat and work without microscopic assumptions.

name: Statistical Mechanics
description: Macroscopic quantities derived from probability distributions over microscopic states.

name: Shannon Information Theory
description: Quantification of uncertainty and coding efficiency for discrete communication systems.

name: Quantum Information Theory
description: Information measures for quantum states using density matrices and operator methods.

name: Algorithmic Information Theory
description: Information measured through shortest descriptions and Kolmogorov complexity.

name: Cross-field Entropy Studies
description: Bridge context for comparing entropy concepts across thermodynamics, physics, and information theory.
